subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ2.30
question_html:
What can be deduced from the infrared (IR) spectrum of a compound?

A. Number of hydrogens

B. Number of hydrogen environments

C. Bonds present

D. Molar mass
examiners_html: 71 % of the candidates identified the bonds present as the information that can be deduced from an infrared spectrum. The most commonly chosen distractor was B (the number of hydrogen environments).
